headline: Assessing Equifax (EFX) Valuation After Dividend Increase And New U.S. Information Solutions Leadership
summary: Equifax (EFX) is back in focus after its board approved a 12% increase in the quarterly dividend to US$0.56 per share, and the company appointed David Smith to lead U.S. Information Solutions. See our latest analysis for Equifax. At a share price of US$206.43, Equifax has had a mixed run, with a 7 day share price return of 6.23% and a 1 year total shareholder return decline of 14.56%, suggesting recent dividend and leadership news may be stabilising sentiment after a weaker stretch. If this...
